meta.title: Sentrix Chain — Real chain, real blocks, real code.
meta.description: Open source, EVM-compatible L1 built in Rust. Mainnet live on Chain ID 7119.

hero.tagline: Open source, EVM-compatible L1 built in Rust.
hero.body: Real chain, real blocks, real code.

founder.line: Built by one developer in Indonesia. No VC, no team. Just Rust, shipped daily.

cta.subheading: Join the Sentrix ecosystem. Deploy tokens, run a validator node, or build your next app on a chain that's built to last.

about.title: What is
about.subtitle: A Layer-1 blockchain engineered for sound money and programmable settlement. Bitcoin-style scarcity meets Ethereum-compatible tooling.

features.title: Engineered for
features.subtitle: Every component built from scratch in Rust. Zero unsafe code. No forks, no shortcuts.

tokens.title: One token.
tokens.subtitle: SRX is the only protocol token. It pays for gas, secures the chain via staking, and aligns economic incentives across the network.

tokenomics.title: Supply
tokenomics.subtitle: Hard-capped at 315 million SRX. Transparent allocation with built-in deflation and halving schedule.

ecosystem.title: Powering real
ecosystem.subtitle: Every product in the SentrisCloud suite runs on Sentrix Chain — creating organic, sustained demand for SRX.

src20.title: SRC-20
src20.subtitle: The Sentrix token standard. Deploy your own token on Sentrix Chain — permissionless, instant, and gas-efficient.

architecture.title: System
architecture.subtitle: A modular, layered architecture built entirely in Rust. Every component is purpose-built and independently testable.

api.title: One port,
api.subtitle: REST, JSON-RPC 2.0, and Block Explorer — all on port 8545. POST endpoints require X-API-Key header.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Every layer of Sentrix is protected by industry-standard cryptographic primitives. Zero compromises.

roadmap.title: The path
roadmap.subtitle: From permissioned PoA to fully decentralized public chain. Progressive decentralization done right.

validators.title: For
validators.subtitle: 4 production validators with DPoS+BFT consensus. Secure the network, earn rewards, shape the chain's future.

developers.title: Start
developers.subtitle: Two surfaces, one chain. Deploy Solidity contracts via the EVM, or use the native Sentrix CLI for first-class tokens.

developerTabs.nativeCaption: Deploy a token with the Sentrix CLI — no compilation step
